indications.name: SVT 1st Dose
indications.dose_formula: 0.1mg/kg IV rapid push
indications.concentration: Undiluted: 6mg/2ml (3mg/ml). Follow with 10-20ml NS flush; consider arm elevation.

indications.name: SVT 2nd Dose
indications.dose_formula: 0.2mg/kg IV rapid push

indications.name: Cardiac Arrest (refractory VT/VF) – 1st Dose
indications.dose_formula: 5mg/kg IV/IO
indications.max_dose: Max 300mg (adult); pediatric max 5mg/kg (may repeat twice, total 15mg/kg)

indications.name: Wide Complex Tachycardia (with pulse)
indications.dose_formula: 150mg IV infusion over 10 minutes
indications.concentration: Dilute 150mg (3ml) in 100ml D5W. If hypotension, slow or stop.

indications.name: Bradycardia (compromised)
indications.dose_formula: 0.02mg/kg IV/IO every 3-5 min
indications.concentration: Diluted: 1mg/10ml (0.1mg/ml). Give as fast IV push.

indications.name: Organophosphate Poisoning
indications.dose_formula: 0.02-0.05mg/kg IV/IO every 3-5 min; double each dose

indications.name: Cardiac Arrest
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 1mg IV/IO every 3-5 min; Pediatric: 0.01mg/kg IV/IO every 3-5 min

indications.name: Anaphylaxis / Severe Asthma / Bradycardia (push dose)
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 0.01mg IV/IO every 2-5 min; Pediatric: 0.005-0.01mg/kg IV/IO every 2-5 min
indications.concentration: 1mg/10ml (1:10,000) for push dose. Infusion: 1mg in 50ml NS = 20mcg/ml.

indications.name: Inotrope Infusion (Pediatric)
indications.dose_formula: 0.05-0.3 mcg/kg/min IV/IO

indications.name: Pre-eclampsia with severe hypertension / Eclampsia
indications.dose_formula: 20mg IV over 2 minutes; may repeat every 10 min (max 80mg)
indications.concentration: Dilution: 8ml Labetalol (40mg) + 12ml NS = 20ml of 2mg/ml. Prepare two syringes.

indications.name: Asthma / COPD
indications.dose_formula: Nebulized: 2.5ml (2.5mg Salbutamol + 0.5mg Ipratropium). Dilute to max 5ml with NS.

indications.name: Bronchospasm (Asthma, COPD, Anaphylaxis)
indications.dose_formula: Nebulized: Adult 5mg; Pediatric <5y 2.5mg, ≥5y 5mg. Dilute to max 5ml with NS.

indications.name: Croup
indications.dose_formula: Nebulized: >4y: 0.5ml; <4y: 0.05ml/kg (max 0.5ml). Dilute in 3ml NS.

indications.name: Moderate to Severe Pain
indications.dose_formula: 3ml inhaled, self-administered. May repeat once (max 6ml/24h adult; pediatric max 3ml).

indications.name: Asthma, COPD, Anaphylaxis (moderate)
indications.dose_formula: 2mg/kg IV/IM/IO. Alternative: <1y:25mg, 1-5y:50mg, >5y:100mg.

indications.name: Severe or life-threatening Asthma/Anaphylaxis
indications.dose_formula: 4mg/kg IV/IM/IO. Adult: 200mg.

indications.name: Asthma (severe or life-threatening)
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 2g IV/IO over 20 min; Pediatric: 40mg/kg IV/IO over 20 min
indications.concentration: Dilute in 100ml NS. Do not mix with adrenaline.

indications.name: Eclampsia
indications.dose_formula: 4g IV over 5-10 min + 8g IM (4g each gluteal)

indications.name: Torsades de Pointes
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 1-2g IV over 5-20 min; Pediatric: 25-50mg/kg IV over 5-20 min (may repeat once)

indications.name: Seizures
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 5mg IV; Pediatric: 0.1mg/kg IV/IO (max 5mg) or 0.5mg/kg PR (max 20mg)
indications.max_dose: Adult 5mg IV; pediatric 5mg IV or 20mg PR
indications.concentration: Dilute 10mg (2ml) in 8ml NS = 1mg/ml. IM not recommended.

indications.name: Sedation of agitated/combative patients
indications.dose_formula: 5mg IV (adult); pediatric 0.1mg/kg IV/IO (max 5mg)

indications.name: Acute Psychosis (suspected mental health illness)
indications.dose_formula: 5mg IM only
indications.concentration: 5mg/1ml ampule. Contraindicated in Parkinson's disease, dementia.

indications.name: Severe Pain
indications.dose_formula: IV: 2.5mg increments every 5 min (max 10mg); IM: 2-10mg (max 20mg). Pediatric: 0.1mg/kg IV/IM/IO.
indications.concentration: Dilute 10mg (1ml) in 9ml NS = 1mg/ml. Caution in elderly, infants <1y, morbid obesity, respiratory compromise.

indications.name: Moderate to Severe Pain
indications.dose_formula: 75mg IM (into large muscle) or IV (dilute in 100ml NS over 10 min). Avoid IV due to thromboembolic risk.

indications.name: Moderate to Severe Pain
indications.dose_formula: 20mg IV once, diluted in 100ml NS over 5 min. Contraindicated in epilepsy, STEMI/NSTEMI, renal impairment, <13 years.

indications.name: Pain and Fever
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 1000mg IV/PO (max 4g/24h). Pediatric IV: 10mg/kg (slow over 10-15 min). Pediatric PR: <5y 125mg, ≥5y 250mg.

indications.name: Cardiac Chest Pain, Pulmonary Edema
indications.dose_formula: 0.4mg SL spray every 3-5 min (max 1.2mg/3 sprays). Do not shake bottle.

indications.name: Diluent for Amiodarone infusion
indications.dose_formula: 100ml as needed

indications.name: Hypoglycemia (RBS <70mg/dl)
indications.dose_formula: 10ml/kg IV/IO (max 125ml in children). Adult: 125-250ml.

indications.name: Hypoglycemia (RBS <70mg/dl) in conscious patients able to swallow
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 1 tube (15g); Pediatric: ½ tube. Must be swallowed – not buccally absorbed.

indications.name: Hypoglycemia, Beta-blocker overdose, Calcium Channel Blocker Overdose
indications.dose_formula: >6y or >25kg: 1mg IM/SC; <6y or <25kg: 0.5mg IM/SC. Repeat q10-15min. Up to 5mg for overdose.
indications.concentration: 1mg/1ml vial. May be ineffective if glycogen stores depleted (sepsis, starvation).

indications.name: Intravascular volume replacement, medication dilution, line flushing
indications.dose_formula: As per CPG. Pediatric: 10ml/kg bolus (max 500ml).

indications.name: Intravascular volume replacement (caution: contraindicated in <1 month, DKA, hypervolemia, liver failure)
indications.dose_formula: As per CPG. Not routine in pediatrics – Normal Saline preferred.

indications.name: Acute Coronary Syndrome
indications.dose_formula: 324mg (4x81mg tablets) chewed. If already taken within 60 min, give additional to reach 324mg total.

indications.name: Moderate to Severe Allergic Reactions / Anaphylaxis
indications.dose_formula: 1mg/kg IM/IV (max 50mg). IM preferred. For IV, dilute in 100ml NS (adult) or 1ml/kg NS (peds) over 5 min.

indications.name: Acute Pulmonary Edema with signs of fluid overload
indications.dose_formula: 40mg IV slow over 1-2 min (adult only). Not for pediatric use.

indications.name: Lower abdominal cramping (gastroenteritis, renal colic, IBS, dysmenorrhea)
indications.dose_formula: 20mg IV/IM/SC. Not for pediatrics.
indications.concentration: 20mg/1ml ampule. Contraindicated in tachyarrhythmias, narrow angle glaucoma, prostate hypertrophy, etc.

indications.name: Nausea and Vomiting
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 10mg IV/IM slow over 3 min or diluted in 100ml NS. Pediatric: 0.1mg/kg IV/IM (generally not recommended due to extrapyramidal effects).
indications.concentration: 10mg/2ml ampule. Contraindicated in epilepsy, Parkinson's, GI obstruction, age <1 year.

indications.name: Opiate overdose
indications.dose_formula: IV/IM: 0.4mg every 3 min (max 2mg); IN: 4mg every 3 min. Pediatric: 0.01mg/kg IV/IM/IO every 3 min. Titrate to reverse respiratory depression only.
indications.max_dose: Adult 2mg (IV/IM) or repeated IN; pediatric 0.01mg/kg repeat
indications.concentration: 0.4mg/1ml ampule; 4mg prefilled IN spray (do not test/prime).

indications.name: Uncontrolled bleeding secondary to trauma or postpartum hemorrhage (within 3 hours of onset)
indications.dose_formula: Adult: 1000mg IV once, diluted in 100ml NS over 10 min. Pediatric: 15mg/kg IV once over 10 min.
